MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EIPPER, KATARINA SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
N/A BY DEFT AT SETTL CONF IN DEPT 1 - JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON NOV-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

#6 MITCHELL/ESPINOCILLA/HOLMES: C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF PRESENT W/ COUNSEL JAMES MILLAR. DEFT, IN PRO PER, PRESENT. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH PARTIES. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVID PRESENTED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST DEFT. JUDGMENT SIGNED BY COURT. EXHIBITS W/D. COURT ADJOURNS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDERMAN, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 113 CUVIER, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $431.79 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $511.79, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN LEGAL FEES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
